message:
wa-dug.5: auto-configuration engine for environment-aware config tuning

Add AutoConfig struct and from_environment() that maps DetectedEnvironment
to optimal configuration values:
- poll_interval_ms: adapts to system load, memory, remote panes
- min_poll_interval_ms: scales with CPU core count
- max_concurrent_captures: 2x cores (min 4, max 32)
- pattern_packs: auto-selects based on detected agent types
- safety: stricter rate limits for remote/production hosts

ConfigRecommendation struct provides human-readable explanations for
wa doctor integration. 13 new tests cover all auto-config rules.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
